programs.title: Love It or List It
programs.desc: With their tiny house crawling with people, Hilary makes the most of Sue and Bruce's home while David presents a move-in-ready space.

programs.title: Love It or List It
programs.desc: Pam believes their bungalow is big enough, but her husband disagrees.

programs.title: Space Invaders
programs.desc: Three home makeover experts help Australian families declutter and organize their homes, sorting the trash from the treasure and helping them live happier lives.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.sub_title: Scratch Offs: Gold Lady of Lake Mendota
programs.desc: With bonus features and pop-ups, a Wisconsin woman who hit the jackpot with a savvy investment enlists David to find her the ultimate lakefront mega-mansion.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.sub_title: Scratch Offs: Tappahannock Is for Lovers
programs.desc: With bonus features and pop-ups, David helps a couple who met as he was recovering from an injury find a dream home in Tappahannock, Virginia.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: A Serendipitous Journey From Atlanta to Valencia
programs.desc: After falling for its charm, a family decides to move from Atlanta to Valencia, Spain; they look to transition to Spanish life and remote work, but they must weigh the cultural allure of city living against what that will cost.
